radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Rescue 2 here command. Give an initial triage update and report whether the highway remains usable for incoming units. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here. Rescue 2. Highway is not passable beyond the pileup. Vehicles are scattered across both lanes with debris and ash over the roadway. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Rescue 2 here command. Confirm number of casualties currently under care and whether any others are visible near the vehicles. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, rescue two. Two people are being treated at the fire truck. No other visible casualties confirmed near the vehicle cluster at this time. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Rescue two here command. Report the scale of the pileup and any immediate hazards before further search. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, rescue two. It is a major pileup. Roughly 15 or more vehicles from what we can see, several burned out and unstable. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Rescue two here, command. Confirm if there is active fire, heavy smoke, or heat showing from the vehicles. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, rescue two. Negative active flame. Only light smoke from some vehicle shells. Burned forest edge remains close to the roadway. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Rescue two here, command. Keep treatment area protected and continue search only along the safe edge of the pileup. listening.
